properties.description: End-to-end pipeline: copies raw CSVs from ADLS to Databricks, runs transformation and sentiment notebooks, then writes results to Azure SQL Warehouse.

activities.name: CopyRawDataToStaging
activities.description: Copy raw CSV files from ADLS Gen2 landing zone to staging container.

activities.name: RunExplorationNotebook
activities.description: Run 01_data_exploration notebook for data quality checks.

activities.name: RunTransformationNotebook
activities.description: Run 02_transformation notebook to compute RestaurantPerformance metrics.

activities.name: RunSentimentNotebook
activities.description: Run 03_sentiment_analysis notebook to compute ReviewsSentiment metrics.
